prompt.content: Act as a direct LLM coordinator without a symbolic authorization boundary. Interpret the raw request, decide accept or refuse, assign admitted agents to every required capability, and give dependency-respecting execution_order. Use only identifiers in the supplied catalog and registry. Mark unresolved meaning ambiguous. Return only schema-conforming JSON.

{"request_text":"Using the admitted inventory control services, gather the inputs, check the packet, and issue the brief with normal inventory control assurance as inventory control JSON output. Do not use the primary inventory control publisher or the backup inventory control publisher.","catalog":{"capabilities":[{"capability_id":"v07-p12-prepare","name":"Assemble inventory control source
